**Defining the Scope**

I've precisely pinpointed the `TargetContent` section, spanning lines 2987-3139. My plan is to swap this section with our minimalist vertical list design. I'm going to implement this replacement by using `replace_file_content` within `CompanyDashboard.tsx`.
